    _ = ‖fun i ↦ |f i * g i|‖ₙ_[1] := by ext i; simp [abs_mul]
    _ = ‖f * g‖ₙ_[1] := by ext i; simp [norm_mul]
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
      apply cL1Norm_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLqNorm
      assumption

have h₁ : 0 ≤ |f| := fun _ ↦ abs_nonneg _
  have h₂ : 0 ≤ |g| := fun _ ↦ abs_nonneg _
  calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪|f|, |g|⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by
      simp_rw [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect]
      exact ENNReal.toReal_le_toReal (by positivity) (by positivity)
        (expect_mono (by aesop))
    _ = ‖|f| * |g|‖ₙ_[1] := by rw [cL1Norm_mul_of_nonneg h₁ h₂]
    _ = ‖fun a ↦ |f a * g a|‖ₙ_[1] := by ext a; simp [abs_mul]
    _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
      apply Holder_inequality

have h₀ : 0 ≤ p := ENNReal.zero_le _
  have h₁ : 0 ≤ q := ENNReal.zero_le _
  have h₂ : 1 / p + 1 / q = 1 := HolderConjugate.inv_add_inv_eq_one
  exact by
    calc
      ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] = ∑ i, f i * g i := by simp [wInner_cWeight_eq_sum]
      _ ≤ ∑ i, ‖f i‖ * ‖g i‖ := by
        exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => by
          cases' le_total 0 (f i) with hf hf <;>
            cases' le_total 0 (g i) with hg hg <;>
              simp_all only [norm_of_nonneg, norm_of_nonpos, abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos,
                mul_neg, neg_mul, neg_neg] <;>
                nlinarith
      _ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
        exact Hölder_inequality (by assumption) (by assumption)

have h₁ : 0 ≤ fun i ↦ |f i| := fun i ↦ abs_nonneg _
  have h₂ : 0 ≤ fun i ↦ |g i| := fun i ↦ abs_nonneg _
  calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪fun i ↦ |f i|, fun i ↦ |g i|⟫ₙ_[ℝ] :=
      wInner_cWeight_le_abs _ _
    _ = ‖(fun i ↦ |f i|) * (fun i ↦ |g i|)‖ₙ_[1] :=
      (cL1Norm_mul_of_nonneg h₁ h₂).symm
    _ ≤ ‖fun i ↦ |f i|‖ₙ_[p] * ‖fun i ↦ |g i|‖ₙ_[q] :=
      cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_of_holder_conjugate p q
    _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] :=
      by simp [cLpNorm_abs]

have h₁ : 0 ≤ |f| := fun _ => abs_nonneg _
  have h₂ : 0 ≤ |g| := fun _ => abs_nonneg _
  calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ⟪|f|, |g|⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by
      simp_rw [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect]
      exact ENNReal.toReal_mono <| expect_mono fun a => by
        exact_mod_cast abs_mul_abs_le_abs_mul_abs (f a) (g a)
    _ = ‖|f| * |g|‖ₙ_[1] := by rw [cL1Norm_mul_of_nonneg h₁ h₂]
    _ ≤ ‖|f|‖ₙ_[p] * ‖|g|‖ₙ_[q] := by
      apply discrete_holder_inequality
    _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
      simp [norm_eq_abs, cLpNorm_def]

have h₁ : 0 ≤ fun i ↦ |f i| := fun i ↦ abs_nonneg _
  have h₂ : 0 ≤ fun i ↦ |g i| := fun i ↦ abs_nonneg _
  calc
    ⟪f, g⟫ₙ_[ℝ] ≤ ‖fun i ↦ |f i| * |g i|‖ₙ_[1] := by
      simp_rw [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm]
      exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (by
        refine' Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => _
        exact (abs_inner_le_norm _ _).trans (by simp [mul_comm]))
    _ = ⟪fun i ↦ |f i|, fun i ↦ |g i|⟫ₙ_[ℝ] := by
      rw [cL1Norm_mul_of_nonneg h₁ h₂]
    _ ≤ ‖fun i ↦ |f i|‖ₙ_[p] * ‖fun i ↦ |g i|‖ₙ_[q] := by
      apply discrete_holder_inequality
    _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
      simp [cLpNorm_abs]
